svg.text: == starting onsim-devd (device daemon, owns the HAL) ==
== starting onsim-netconfd (management plane, talks DDS to the device) ==
[1] provision transponder 400G / 16QAM and bring it up
[2] provision cross-connects ch40: port 1→2 ch41: port 1→3
[3] provoke a wavelength collision (ch40 to port 2 again)
device rejected it, as it should: wavelength collision on output port
tick=9 p2:-16.00dBm p3:-16.00dBm xpdr[up 400G QAM16] osnr=30.14dB ber=7.3e-06
dds tick=14 ports=4 xpdr[up 400G] osnr=30.29 ber=5.1e-06 (Cyclone DDS)
Demo complete: config push, state read, and transactional rejection, all over real NETCONF.
